uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

ApiKey.title: API Key
ApiKey.description: Stored API key for translation engines.

keyId.description: The unique identifier for the key.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this key.

name.description: A friendly name for the key (e.g., 'Gemini Pro Key').

engine.description: The translation engine this key is for.

lastUsed.description: When the key was last used for translation.

status.description: The current status of the key.

Translation.title: Translation
Translation.description: Stored translation for a specific page of a document.

updatedAt.description: When the translation was last updated.

/users/{userId}/documents/{docId}/pages/.description: Collection of translations for a specific document and page.
